findings.description: The prerequisite that this chapter is based on the example application and users must build the Example application environment in advance is missing. This is a concrete precondition for following this Getting Started guide.
findings.source_evidence: 前提条件: 本章は :ref:`example_application` をベースに解説する。Exampleアプリケーションの動作環境を事前に構築しておくこと。
